About Kovil AI

We Make AI
Actually Ship.

Kovil AI is a managed AI engineering company. We embed vetted AI engineers into your team, build AI projects at a fixed price and timeline, and rescue AI applications that aren't working. We don't just provide talent — we own the delivery.

Top 5%

of applicants accepted

2-week

risk-free trial on every engagement

3

engagement models for every situation

Zero

failed deliveries — milestone-gated

Our Mission

"Most AI projects fail not because the idea was bad — but because delivery was broken."

We built Kovil AI to close the gap between AI's potential and reliable AI delivery. Every system we design, every engineer we place, every project we take on — runs through a managed delivery process that owns the outcome, not just the hours.

How We Work

Built on four principles

Outcome-first delivery

We measure ourselves by what ships, not by hours logged. Every engagement is milestone-gated — you approve each stage before we move forward.

Managed accountability

An Engagement Manager owns every project. Not just a PM — someone who speaks AI fluently and holds the quality bar end to end.

Zero onboarding tax

Our engineers are pre-vetted and AI-native. They join your codebase and start contributing from day one — no ramp-up, no hand-holding.

Top 5% only

We run a rigorous technical assessment: live coding, LLM architecture challenges, system design, and domain-specific AI tasks. Only the best join the Kovil network.

Our Story

How we got here

2022

Founded

Kovil AI was founded in New York by a team of engineers who saw too many AI projects fail not from bad ideas — but from bad delivery.

2023

First 10 clients

We refined the managed delivery model across fintech, healthcare, and SaaS — shipping AI that actually worked in production.

2024

Three engagement models

We formalised our three offerings: Managed AI Engineer, Outcome-Based AI Projects, and AI Reliability & App Rescue.

2025

Scaling up

Expanded the engineer network globally, introduced the Engagement Manager role, and launched milestone-gated delivery as a core commitment.

2026

Today

Kovil AI operates as a fully managed AI engineering service trusted by product teams across the US, UK, and beyond.

Clarity

What Kovil AI is not

We're deliberately different from the alternatives. Here's what you won't get from us.

Not a staffing agency

We don't drop an engineer on you and disappear. We manage the delivery and own the outcome.

Not a freelance marketplace

Every engineer is pre-vetted, managed, and backed by an Engagement Manager. No vetting burden on you.

Not a big agency

No 12-week discovery phases, no bloated teams, no surprise scope changes. We're lean, fast, and accountable.

The Team

Meet the founders

Davis Rajan

Co-Founder, Kovil AI

20+ years across IT services, enterprise technology, and global operations. Davis drives Kovil AI's growth strategy, go-to-market execution, and outcome-based delivery model — moving clients from traditional development cycles to AI-accelerated results.

GTM & Enterprise SalesAI-Led Delivery ModelsGlobal Ops & Offshore Delivery20+ Years IT Leadership

Sahdev Thakur

Co-Founder, Kovil AI

Deep expertise in talent acquisition, offshore delivery, and engineering operations. Sahdev built Kovil AI's talent engine — the system that matches, vets, and deploys the right AI engineer to the right team in under 48 hours.

Talent AcquisitionOffshore Delivery SystemsExecution & OperationsGlobal Client Delivery

Ready to ship your AI?

Book a 30-minute discovery call. No sales pitch — we'll listen to what you're building and tell you honestly if we can help.
